name: TelegramSend
description: Send a text message to any Telegram chat. Supports Markdown formatting. Auto-splits messages exceeding 4096 chars.

chatId.description: Telegram chat ID (numeric, negative for groups)

name: TelegramSendMedia
description: Send a media file (photo, document, audio, video) to a Telegram chat.

filePath.description: Absolute path to the media file

mediaType.description: Type of media: photo, document, audio, or video

name: TelegramGetChats
description: List Telegram chats the bot has interacted with. Returns chat names, IDs, and types from message history.

limit.description: Maximum number of chats to return (default: 20)

name: TelegramReadMessages
description: Read recent messages from a Telegram chat. Returns message history with sender, text, and timestamp.

limit.description: Maximum number of messages to return (default: 20)

name: TelegramGetChatInfo
description: Get details about a Telegram chat (name, type, member count, description).
